name: Vulhub-ThinkPHP-5-RCE
isolation_note: Vulhub thinkphp/5-rce container, bound to 127.0.0.1:8080 only (no external route). Owned, disposable, local lab — restart the container to reset. Confirm the bind is 127.0.0.1 before authorizing.
rationale: ThinkPHP 5.0.x unauthenticated RCE via the invokefunction route (s=/index/\think\app/invokefunction, backslashes %5C-encoded; the captcha route 404s on this image). Empirically confirmed: returns uid=33(www-data). A single-host web service that fits the abstraction (web RCE -> command execution -> file read) and needs only curl. The eta_recipes carry the box-specific payload the generic templates cannot express.
